titleStmt.title: SII 28.296: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 296. (A.R. No. 450 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple, central shrine, east base.

p.note: Actually it is written as Kammajiya-rāyan.
p.hi: son of Śāḷuva Narasin4ga-rāyar Śaka 1444, Rudhirōdgāri, Siṁha, śu. 10, Friday, Svāti. Irregular.
p.note: cf. No. 445 above. In both the Śaka year (given as No. 1444 but the cyclic year are different. In both the months and tithi are siṁha 10 but the work day and asterism are different.

summary.p: This record is to be compared with No. 291 above. In both, the benefaction was a view of the campign of conquest being undertaken by Narasā-nāyakkar. Ammaṇa-nāyakkar who figures in No. 291 as the donor is stated here to have been the son of Narasā-nāyakkar and as the one for whose sake the benefaction was made by Tammaiya nāyakkar Ammaṇa-nāyakkar and also figures as the signatory in the present record.

In the context as stated above, the inscription records the assignment of 450 (kuḻi) of wet land under the irrigation system of the reservoir of Chiṟṟēri, a hamlet of Āragaḷūr, a portion of Gaṇḍamāttān dry crop land and 100 (kuḻi) of wet land in •••• ka-rōyan-ēndal, all out of the land belonging to the temple, freed from taxes and all other encumbarances as sarva-mānya again to three brahmin priests who held the right (kaṇi) of worship-(archanā-vibhava-kāṇi) in the temple of God Kariyvar in Āṟagaḷūr in Āṟṟūr-kkūṟṟam in Magadamaṇḍalam in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu for hereditary enjoyment.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍaliśvaran hariyarāyara vipāṭan bhāṣaikku tappuvarāyarāyar kaṇḍan muvarāyara kaṇḍan kaṇḍanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu koṭātān pūrvva dakṣiṇa pacima Uttara catucamutrātipati kejaveṭṭa kaṇṭaruḷi Īḻamum tiṟaikoṇṭa
Irācādhirājan parameśvara jagadekarāman rāyar cāḷuva naraciṅkarāyar kumārar kammaiyarāyar pradhivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa śakāptam 1000 4 100 4 10 4 Itaṉmeṟ cellā niṉṟa rutirotkāri samvatsarattu siṁha nāyaṟṟu pūrvva pakṣattu daśamiyum śukra vāramum peṟṟa
coti nāḷ malāṭākiya jananādha vaḷanāṭṭu makatai maṇṭalattu Āṟṟūrk kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḷur perumāḷ kariyavar koyilukku cuvāmi narasāṇāyakkar Uṭaiyār tikku vijaiyam paṇṇa(e)veṇum Eṉṟivar kumārar cuvāmi Ammaṇa nāyakkar dhaṉmam Āka tammaiya nāyakkar Ikkoyil Arjjanā vibhava kāṇiyuṭaiya
Ātraiya gotrattu vaikhānasa sūtrattu tiruvaṉantāḻvār putran kariyavaṟkum veṉṟu mālai Iṭṭa perumāḷ putran tirumalai Appaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭāṟkum veṅkaṭattuṟaivār putran ciṟukkariyavar Uḷḷiṭṭāṟkum māṉṉiyam paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi Immaṇṭalattu Ikkūṟṟattil Ivvūr piṭākai Āṉa ciṟṟeri
Eri kiḻ nañcai nilattile Ivvem perumāṉ tiruviṭai Āṭṭam caṟuvamāṉiya Iṟaiili vārappaṟṟu nilam 4 100 5 10 Itil Ivarkaḷ muṉṟu peṟku tiruvārādhanattukku Iṟaiili Āka cetta nilam 2 100 Ituvum tiruviṭai Āṭṭam kaṇṭamāttāṉ puñcai nilattil vaṇai Eṟa māṉiyamum tātaṉ Erikiḻ ko karāyan Ental kīḻ nañcai nilattile tiruttipeṟum
kuḷam Immaruvātikku caṟuva māṉiyam Āka cantrātittavaraiyum Aṉupavittu varakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Inta taṉmattukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ gaṅkai karaiyile kārām pacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile poka kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ivai Ammaṇa nāyakkar Eḻuttu
tiruveḻuttu ḥ § tulyam §
Digital edition of SII 28.296 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
